creator: mikeg@bsd-box.net
text:
Hi Stefan,

I haven't been able to reproduce the original issue with a reas-only =
nss_ldap config file & haven't heart back from Gerrit for a while Re: =
testing with the updated port, but it seems this was fixed in nss_ldap's =
codebase a while back so it should be safe to close the PR.

-MG

On May 16, 2010, at 6:39 AM, Stefan Walter wrote:

> Hi Michael,
>=20
> any news on this issue? Is there a patch for the port, yet?
>=20
> Regards,
> Stefan
